discussion_comments.comment_body: The bind mount target `/home/appuser/app/reports` is intentional. The CLI's `save_report_to_disk()` function writes reports using `Path.cwd() / "reports"`, which resolves to `/home/appuser/app/reports` inside the container (the app's working directory). This is confirmed working — structured report folders appear correctly on the host under [reports](vscode-file://vscode-app/Applications/Visual%20Studio%20Code.app/Contents/Resources/app/out/vs/code/electron-browser/workbench/workbench.html). Changing the mount to `/home/appuser/.tradingagents/logs` would redirect only the internal debug log, not the user-facing reports this change is designed to persist.

The bind mount target `/home/appuser/app/reports` is intentional. The CLI's `save_report_to_disk()` function writes reports using `Path.cwd() / "reports"`, which resolves to `/home/appuser/app/reports` inside the container (the app's working directory). This is confirmed working — structured report folders appear correctly on the host under [reports](vscode-file://vscode-app/Applications/Visual%20Studio%20Code.app/Contents/Resources/app/out/vs/code/electron-browser/workbench/workbench.html). Changing the mount to `/home/appuser/.tradingagents/logs` would redirect only the internal debug log, not the user-facing reports this change is designed to persist.
